title: astragalus dissectus
intro: Astragalus dissectus is a plant species in the legume family, commonly known as a type of Astragalus, a genus of about 2,000 species of herbs and shrubs. The Astragalus dissectus plant is traditionally used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits of Astragalus dissectus include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels and blood pressure. Astragalus dissectus is often prepared as a decoction or tea, as well as being dried and encapsulated or made into a tincture for herbal supplements.
